name: QLC+ Generic
description: Generic QLC+ profile. Adjust OSC paths to match your Virtual Console button/fader assignments.

ping._comment: QLC+ ignores unknown OSC messages; skip_ping workaround is set below

_comment_paths: OSC paths below map to QLC+ Virtual Console widgets.
In QLC+: Settings → Input/Output → OSC, enable input/output.
Each Virtual Console button/fader needs an OSC input path assigned.
Adjust /qlc/scene/{n}, /qlc/master, etc. to match YOUR Virtual Console setup.

entities.name: master_dim
entities._comment: Path: QLC+ Virtual Console Fader → OSC input path = /qlc/master

entities.name: group_1_dim
entities._comment: Path: QLC+ Virtual Console Fader → OSC input path = /qlc/group/1/dim

entity_templates.name: scene_{n}
entity_templates._comment: Adjust /qlc/scene/{n} to match QLC+ VC button OSC paths. 4 buttons: scene_1..scene_4.
